headline: Regeneron Wins FDA Nod for Extended Eylea HD Dosing Interval
summary: REGN wins FDA nod to extend Eylea HD dosing to 20 weeks, boosting flexibility for wAMD and DME patients while reinforcing its push to offset declining Eylea sales.

raw.headline: Regeneron Wins FDA Nod for Extended Eylea HD Dosing Interval
raw.summary: REGN wins FDA nod to extend Eylea HD dosing to 20 weeks, boosting flexibility for wAMD and DME patients while reinforcing its push to offset declining Eylea sales.

headline: All You Need to Know About Regeneron (REGN) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: Regeneron (REGN) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
